Security tip: Domain Breakdown

Understanding the exam domains and their weights is critical for efficient study planning. Focus more time on heavily-weighted domains while ensuring you cover all areas. Domain 1: Governance (26%) 1....

- 1.1 Identify impacts of IT risk on business objectives
- 1.2 Establish and maintain risk management framework
- 1.3 Maintain IT risk register
- 1.4 Facilitate risk appetite and tolerance definition
